'''Thorsh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] operating as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] and reconnaissance agent in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] military during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] and [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] among other [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].

Thorsh participated in [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]] over [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]], and was among the military personnel captured there by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He was incarcerated on [[Selvaris]] along with [[Pash Cracken]] and [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]. When the informant known as [[Ryn one-one-five|Ryn 115]] provided the captives with data concerning Yuuzhan Vong operations, Thorsh memorized the encoded data and, along with three [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] prisoners, managed to escape from the prison camp to waiting [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]].

The escape was quickly discovered by the Yuuzhan Vong, who pursued Thorsh and his colleagues across Selvaris. The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] arrived on planet in time to recover Thorsh, though the Bith did not make it off the planet. Thorsh was taken to [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] for debriefing, and the information he had memorized was deciphered. This knowledge revealed that a convoy of prisoners from Selvaris was traveling to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for sacrifice, and allowed the Galactic Alliance to launch a rescue effort.
